services-wedding.heading: Wedding Car Rental Dubai: Arrive in a White Rolls-Royce
services-wedding.quickAnswer: Rolls-Royce Dubai offers white bridal-car wedding rentals from AED 3,800/day, chauffeur-driven or self-drive, with decoration and free delivery across Dubai.
keyFacts: Wedding fleet: white Rolls-Royce Ghost (from AED 3,800/day), Phantom flagship (AED 5,800/day), Dawn convertible (AED 5,500/day) and Cullinan (AED 6,500/day).
Bridal car comes with floral decoration and a professional chauffeur, or self-drive for qualifying renters; hourly hire from AED 800 (2-hour minimum).
Free delivery across Dubai including Downtown, Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, JBR and Business Bay; service also available in Abu Dhabi.
Book 24/7 via WhatsApp +971 55 816 4922 or info@rollsroycers.com; multilingual team in English, Arabic and Russian.
body: Make your entrance unforgettable with our wedding car rental Dubai service, built around the pristine white Rolls-Royce Phantom and Ghost. Each bridal car arrives with elegant ribbon and floral decoration, a discreet professional chauffeur in formal attire, and free delivery anywhere across Dubai, from Palm Jumeirah villas to Downtown ballrooms and beachfront resorts.

Rates start from AED 3,800 per day for the Ghost and AED 5,800 for the flagship Phantom, so you can match your budget to your big day. We coordinate timings around the ceremony, photoshoot, and reception, and arrange seamless airport pickup for arriving guests. Book your wedding Rolls-Royce anytime over 24/7 WhatsApp with multilingual support.

faqs.question: How much is a wedding car rental in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Rolls-Royce wedding car rental in Dubai starts at AED 3,800/day for the Ghost. The white Phantom is AED 5,800, Dawn convertible AED 5,500 and Cullinan AED 6,500. Every booking includes a uniformed chauffeur, bridal decoration and red carpet.

faqs.question: Can I get a white Rolls-Royce wedding car with a driver in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our white Phantom and Ghost are maintained specifically for weddings and always come with a professional chauffeur in formal attire, so you and your bridal party simply relax and enjoy the day.

faqs.question: Is decoration and delivery included in the wedding car rental?
faqs.answer: Yes. Floral decoration, ribbons, a Just Married sign and a red carpet are included, and we deliver the car free of charge to your venue, hotel or home anywhere in Dubai.

faqs.question: Which white Rolls-Royce is best for a wedding in Dubai?
faqs.answer: The Phantom Extended is the most popular for its grand presence and spacious cabin. The Ghost suits an intimate ceremony, while the Dawn convertible is ideal for outdoor photos and warm-evening celebrations.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I book a wedding car in Dubai?
faqs.answer: We recommend booking 2–4 weeks ahead to secure your preferred white Rolls-Royce and date, especially in peak season. Last-minute bookings are welcome on WhatsApp at +971 55 816 4922, subject to availability.
